About the band

More than a band.
We create experiences.

Active Radio is a high-energy alternative rock band from Kerala delivering cinematic live performances across India. From college festivals to corporate events and large public shows, every performance is crafted with powerful music, immersive production, and unforgettable audience engagement.

Why Active Radio

Built for a world-class show.

Powerful Live Performance

Full-energy sets played live, every time.

Professional Musicians

Six trained performers on every stage.

International-Level Production

Sound and lighting built for scale.

Complete Stage Experience

Production, visuals and performance, coordinated.

Custom Setlists

Sets built around your audience and event.

Reliable Event Execution

Consistent delivery, show after show.

Premium Sound

A full live mix engineered for the room.

Visual Show Design

Lighting and stage visuals built into the set.

Our journey

The road so far.

Band Formation

Active Radio comes together as a six-piece live act.

Major College Shows

Building a name on festival stages across Kerala.

Corporate Tours

Bringing full-scale live sets to corporate stages.

South India Expansion

Extending the stage to Bangalore and beyond.

Production Partnership

Teaming with Proactive Production for full-scale shows.

Current Journey

Still touring, still turning stages into experiences.
